Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe tools/higgsfield_gen.py --model gpt_image_2 --prompt "A cozy, warm home interior in soft natural daylight: a comfortable living room with a beige sofa and soft cushions, a wooden side table, a large window on the left with sheer curtains letting in warm morning light, framed family photos and a couple of leafy plants in the background, hardwood floor, an open kitchen with wooden cabinets visible further back. Inviting, lived-in, homely but tidy. No people. Photorealistic, natural daylight." --param aspect_ratio=9:16 --param resolution=2k --out assets/mode-earn/extraincomeforretirees/ai-images/environment.png --log assets/mode-earn/extraincomeforretirees/generation-log.json --label "environment")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe tools/higgsfield_gen.py --model gpt_image_2 --image assets/_shared/personas/retiree-female-poc/base-character.png --image assets/mode-earn/extraincomeforretirees/ai-images/environment.png --prompt "A 3x3 grid showing the exact same 66-year-old woman from the reference image, same face and identity, wearing the same mauve cardigan over a cream blouse, seated comfortably on the beige sofa and relaxed in this same warm cozy home. Nine different sitting positions and camera angles, but she is looking directly at the camera in every one of the nine shots. Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe tools/higgsfield_gen.py --model kling3_0 --start-image assets/mode-earn/extraincomeforretirees/ai-images/img-1.png --prompt "Begin on the exact frontal medium close-up of the 66-year-old African American woman from the reference image, looking directly into the lens, matching her relaxed pose seated on the beige sofa, wearing the mauve cardigan over a cream blouse, with warm natural window light and the cozy living room behind her remaining completely unchanged. The camera remains completely static with no movement throughout the shot. She begins speaking directly to the camera in a warm, soothing, trustworthy grandmotherly tone with a slightly raspy, rich, resonant lower register and slow, deliberate pacing, delivering the line: 'I'm retired... the last thing I wanted was another job.' As she speaks she gives a small, knowing shake of the head and a gentle, easy hand gesture, her expression candid, warm, and a little wry, settling into a relaxed posture as the line concludes. Her lighting, wardrobe, and the background details stay completely consistent throughout, a seamless single take." --param aspect_ratio=9:16 --param duration=5 --param mode=pro --param sound=on --timeout 30m --out "assets/mode-earn/extraincomeforretirees/ai-videos/Clip 1.mp4" --log assets/mode-earn/extraincomeforretirees/generation-log.json --label "Clip 1" --skip-auth-check)
